title: ditassa itambensis
intro: Ditassa itambensis, also known as "Ditassa itambensis", is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It is a perennial vine native to Brazil, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Ditassa itambensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
